---
title: "pedigreekit 近交系数测试"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## 读取测试数据

```{r}
library(pedigreekit)
ped <- read.csv("ped.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
str(ped)

progeny <- ped$ID
sire <- ped$DadID
dam <- ped$MaID
```

## calculate_inbreeding（向量输入）

```{r}
inb_vec <- calculate_inbreeding(
  progeny = progeny,
  sire = sire,
  dam = dam
)
write.csv(inb_vec, "inb_vec.csv", row.names = FALSE)
head(inb_vec)
```

## calculate_inbreeding（data.frame 输入，列名为 progeny/sire/dam）

```{r}
ped2 <- data.frame(
  progeny = progeny,
  sire = sire,
  dam = dam,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
inb_df <- calculate_inbreeding(ped2)
head(inb_df)
```

## calculate_inbreeding（file 输入，逗号分隔）

```{r}
inb_file <- calculate_inbreeding(
  file = "ped.csv",
  sep = ",",
  progeny = "ID",
  sire = "DadID",
  dam = "MaID"
)
head(inb_file)
```
